svg.title: dar-backup overview
svg.text: Flow · Backup types · Directories · Logging · Cleanup · Systemd
One file per definition: photos, documents…
Defines root dir, includes/excludes, per-backup PAR2
Optional separate PAR2_DIR · optional verify after create
Random files extracted & compared after each backup
⚠ Constraint: If no DIFF exists, no INCR will be created. Seed a new cycle by running a DIFF first.
• Deletes DIFF and INCR older than configured age thresholds
Strips verbose dar output from logs
Starts Datasette · opens metrics dashboard in the browser
Generates systemd service + timer units for dar-backup
